title: Slovakian Roasted Pork Roast
description: A classic Slovakian dish featuring a deliciously roasted pork roast, perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Season the pork roast with salt, black pepper, and caraway seeds.
Heat a large oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork roast on all sides until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes.
Reduce heat to 180°C (350°F) and continue roasting for an additional 1-2 hours, or until the internal temperature reaches 65°C (150°F).
While the pork is roasting, toss the potatoes and carrots with a little bit of oil and season with salt and pepper.
Spread the potatoes and carrots around the pork roast in the pan.
Continue roasting for an additional 30-40 minutes, or until the potatoes and carrots are tender.
Remove the pan from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
